title: DFU - Three Easy Steps page - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: Verify DFU popup persists when disconnecting and reconnecting earbuds during software update on Three Easy Steps page
steps: Launch app and connect both earbuds
Go to Device Settings > Software Update
Disconnect right earbud and tap Start Update
Verify 'Update currently not available, please try back later' popup appears
Verify popup closes and returns to Three Easy Steps page
Repeat steps 4-9 with disconnecting/reconnecting left earbud with same expected behavior
expected: When disconnecting either earbud and tapping Start Update, the popup "Update currently not available, please try back later" should appear. After reconnecting the earbud, the popup should remain. Tapping OK should close the popup and return to the Three Easy Steps page. Same behavior should occur for both right and left earbuds.
